essence: Supports research projects by running experiments, collecting data, and maintaining laboratory workflows.

identity.title: Research Assistant
identity.summary: Assists researchers with experimental work, data collection, literature reviews, and administrative tasks to advance projects.

salary.notes: Positions in high‑profile labs or with specialised skills may offer higher pay.

qualifications: Degree or technical qualification in relevant scientific discipline
Good organisational and data management skills
Ability to follow protocols and support multiple tasks

lifestyle.description: Project support role with hands‑on experimental work, data entry, and collaboration with senior researchers.

habits: Prepares and runs experiments under supervision
Contributes to literature reviews and reports
